title: Implement with_timeout that cancels on expiry
description: Implement atimeout.timeout.with_timeout(make_coro, seconds): an async function that awaits the coroutine returned by make_coro() and returns its result if it finishes within `seconds`; otherwise it raises TimeoutError AND ensures the underlying coroutine is cancelled (does not leak a running task). The snapshot is a stub that raises NotImplementedError. Fix atimeout/timeout.py. Do not modify any test files.
